query:
-- STEP 3: Update order totals
-- ============================================================================

UPDATE orders
SET total_amount = (
  SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_price), 0)
  FROM order_items
  WHERE order_id = '10c5afbd-e617-4a0d-921b-3975078ef054'
)
WHERE id = '10c5afbd-e617-4a0d-921b-3975078ef054';
